description_long: This is a modern platform bed with a low-profile, rectangular frame and a slightly curved, padded headboard. The bed features a thick, light gray mattress that sits flush within the dark gray upholstered frame, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The headboard is gently angled for comfort and is fully upholstered, matching the rest of the frame. The bed stands on short, metallic legs that are only partially visible, adding to its minimalist aesthetic. There are no visible footboards or side rails extending above the mattress, emphasizing the clean lines of the design. The overall look is functional and stylish, suitable for urban apartments or modern homes.
description: A modern platform bed with a padded, curved headboard and a thick, light gray mattress set in a dark gray upholstered frame on short metallic legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the padded headboard and the full width of the mattress within the dark frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the mattress and the gentle angle of the headboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the headboard and the solid, continuous frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the mattress depth and the headboard's profile.
